overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a fantasy RPG showing a student in dark robes exploring a Hogwarts-style common room and adjacent areas. The character follows a ghostly figure through warmly lit wooden interiors, up a narrow stone staircase, past a decorated Christmas tree, and up an ornate spiral staircase. The environment features rich wood paneling, tapestries, and medieval Gothic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room with fireplace and leather seating

events.description: character begins following the ghostly figure floating ahead
approaching the stone archway exit at the far end of the room

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room following a translucent ghostly figure in period clothing

notable_agents.action: translucent ghost floating through the room and leading the way toward the archway

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with decorative mantel and green banker lamp on the hearth
upholstered seating furniture arranged around the fireplace
framed portrait with gold oval frame hanging above the fireplace
ornate hanging chandelier with multiple lights suspended from the ceiling
dark wood paneling covering the walls with decorative trim

segments.scene_description: The character enters a warmly lit common room featuring an ornate fireplace with a green banker's lamp, leather armchairs, and dark wood paneling. A translucent ghostly figure floats ahead, leading the character through the space toward a stone archway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone staircase between rough walls

events.description: exiting the common room into a narrow stone stairwell
ascending the steep stone steps between close walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the narrow stone staircase with rough-hewn walls on both sides

entered.detail: steep stone stairs with worn steps ascending between walls
rough gray stone walls enclosing the narrow stairwell
doorway at the top of the stairs leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dimly lit stone stairwell, leaving the common room behind. The space is enclosed by rough stone walls as the character ascends the steep steps toward a wooden door frame at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance hall with Christmas tree and notice board

events.description: stopping to examine the notice board with posted papers
resuming walk toward the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: pausing to read the notice board before continuing toward the spiral staircase

entered.detail: tall Christmas tree adorned with ornaments and lights in the center of the hall
bulletin board with multiple papers and notices pinned to it
ornate wooden spiral staircase ascending to the upper level
upper level balcony with wooden railings overlooking the hall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stone stairs into a hall with a large decorated Christmas tree, the character pauses to examine a wooden notice board covered in papers. The space features wooden paneling and an ornate spiral staircase visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate wooden spiral staircase with portraits

events.description: entering the spiral staircase from the hall below
passing wall sconces creating shifting warm light and shadows on the walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral wooden staircase with ornate railings and passing framed portraits

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase spiraling upward with carved steps
intricately carved wooden handrail following the curve of the stairs
series of framed portraits hanging on the walls alongside the staircase
decorative ceiling with beams and hanging lanterns above the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the ornate spiral wooden staircase, gripping the carved banister as the camera follows the curving path upward. Framed portraits line the walls, and warm light from wall sconces illuminates the ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with stone walls and hanging banners

events.description: exiting the spiral staircase into the stone-walled upper corridor
turning right to follow the corridor lined with red banners

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper corridor with hanging red banners and stone walls

entered.detail: rough stone block walls replacing the wood paneling of the lower floors
long red fabric banners with gold emblems hanging from the ceiling
lit wall-mounted lanterns providing warm illumination
arched stone doorway at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Exiting the spiral staircase, the character enters an upper corridor with rough stone walls and long red hanging banners. The character turns right, passing wall sconces and framed portraits as they proceed toward a stone archway at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy, warmly lit common room through a series of ascending architectural transitions into a stark upper corridor. It begins by following a translucent ghostly figure past a green banker's lamp and leather armchairs, moving through the dark wood paneling toward a stone archway. As the character leaves the warmth behind, the scene shifts into a narrow, dimly lit stone stairwell that climbs steeply before opening into a hall featuring a decorated Christmas tree and a wooden notice board. The camera then follows the character up an ornate spiral wooden staircase, passing framed portraits and wall sconces, before finally emerging into an upper corridor defined by rough stone walls and long red hanging banners.
